raw_consumer_statement:
Formal Dispute Urgent Attention Required Fraudulent Charges on Inactive Card To : American Express Customer Finance / Executive Office From : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Date : XX/XX/year>2025 Account ending in : XXXX Dear American Express Customer Finance Team, I am writing to formally escalate an unresolved issue regarding a fraudulent charge of {$2000.00} that was made on a credit card I never activated, never used, and never authorized anyone else to use.

Timeline and Summary of the Problem : I was approved for an American Express credit card and received the approval confirmation by email on XX/XX/year>2025. 
The physical card was delivered to my XXXX address at XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, Florida, XXXX, before I arrived at the location. 
On XX/XX/scrub> 2025, I received a transaction alert for {$640.00}, even though I had not yet activated the card. 
I immediately called American Express to report the fraud. I was assured the card would be canceled, and the charge would be treated as fraudulent. 
Despite that, I received a full statement for {$2000.00} and have since filed three disputes, all of which were denied under the claim that I allegedly authorized another cardholder which is completely false.

Let me make it absolutely clear : I never activated the card.

I never made any transaction.

I never authorized anyone to access my account.

I was not even physically present at the address when the card was delivered, meaning I had no control over what happened to it before I arrived.

What I Am Requesting : Immediate reopening of the fraud investigation.

Full removal of the {$2000.00} in charges from my account.

Written confirmation that this situation will not affect my credit report in any way.

A copy of all internal documentation that Amex used to justify denying my previous disputes.

If this matter is not resolved within 10 business days, I will proceed with a formal complaint to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ), the Florida Attorney Generals Office, and will consider legal action for damages related to fraud negligence and credit harm.

I appreciate your urgent attention to this matter. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, FL XXXX Phone : ( XXXX ) XXXX Email : XXXX XXXX
